description: A gentle orchestral score for warm strings and piano, 254 seconds long. Opens with a soft sustained string chord beneath a delicate piano figure. Low strings sustain beneath a held brass chord. At 25.9 seconds, a repeating string figure begins beneath the brass. At 56.8 seconds, a repeating string figure begins beneath the brass. At 89 seconds, a repeating string figure begins beneath the brass. At 123.8 seconds, the orchestra pulls back briefly before the next motion. At 189.2 seconds, a brief pull-back to quiet sustained strings for about four seconds. At 193.2 seconds, a single bright orchestral accent — a clear chord with timpani, followed by a sustained warm chord underneath. At 205.5 seconds, the chord resolves with finality and slowly fades to silence by 254 seconds. Style: gentle orchestral score for strings and piano, no vocals, no electronic elements, restrained and contemplative.
